mapper.select:
select bc.id, bc.category_id as categoryId, sc.name as categoryName, bc.budget_cycle as budgetCycle, bc.budget_amount as budgetAmount from budget_config bc left join system_category sc on bc.category_id = sc.id
bc.user_id = #{userId} and bc.is_deleted = 0
and bc.budget_cycle = #{cycle}
order by bc.budget_cycle asc, bc.id asc

select id, user_id, category_id, budget_cycle, budget_amount, create_time, update_time, is_deleted from budget_config where user_id = #{userId} and category_id = #{categoryId} and budget_cycle = #{budgetCycle} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into budget_config ( user_id, category_id, budget_cycle, budget_amount ) values ( #{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{budgetCycle}, #{budgetAmount} )
